# Event Systems (ИВЕНТ СИСТЕМЫ)

Professional event production and equipment rental company based in Saint Petersburg, Russia.

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+)
- Design System: Round & Slate Monochrome (32px border-radius, Manrope font)
- Animations: Scroll-reveal via Intersection Observer API
- Hosting: GitHub Pages

## Architecture
- `/css/style.css`: Core design system and mobile responsiveness.
- `/js/main.js`: Scroll animations and interactive elements.
- `/assets/`: High-quality equipment PNGs (transparent) and site media.

## Equipment Focus
- Audio: d&b audiotechnik, JBL VRX/PRX
- Lighting: Clay Paky, Robe

## Project Context
The site is designed to be "modern premium" and industrial, reflecting the high-end nature of professional concert equipment.
